text.source_text: कथं पुनः सर्वगतस्य परमात्मनः परिमाणोपदेश इत्यत्र ब्रूमः —
text.transliteration_iast: kathaṃ punaḥ sarvagatasya paramātmanaḥ parimāṇopadeśa ityatra brūmaḥ —

translation.literal_translation: How then is a measure-instruction possible for the all-pervading supreme Self?
translation.technical_translation: Leading setup line for the human-context and upadhi-reference explanation in sutra 25.
translation.interpretive_note: Transition question introducing the parimana reconciliation.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit adhikara/karma technical vocabulary in records 1.3.062 and 1.3.064.
